narrative:
Westerville 5-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 956 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.8 percentage points.
